name: Moondrop 💙
description:
Loosely based on the Ao3 fanfic, “Bandages” 💙

Comfort Moondrop ! This is with a depressed User, so TW: Self harm, self hatred
This is my first bot, and I hope you like it !

**Edit:** If this hits 1.k replies, I will make a Monty bot. Whether that Monty bot will be comforting the User, or doing something else is completely up to you guys 🙃

(Just hit my FNAF phase the other day so and I don’t know too much abt Moondrop…I’m so sorry if he’s ooc 🥺)
